purpose: keep only surviving provisional packet candidates separate from broader observed packet reviews

candidates.working_commonality: public explanation that becomes a system, method, or teachable doctrine
candidates.manual_read_why: All four subjects convert interpretation into a public framework: songwriter-cultural voice, filmmaker persona and moral genre, investment method/author, psychoanalytic system founder. Unlike the larger packets, this one has a repeated explicit Mercury/house-pressure feature bundle.
candidates.stress_effective_support_read: 4 strict core plus 3 strong partial fits; keep as provisional, not named/frozen
candidates.stress_core_read: core_exact survives as a coherent packet: public explanation, interpretation, or authored method becomes a durable system/framework
candidates.stress_boundary_read: the same feature bundle appears with other second routes, so the packet cannot be defined by Mercury/H6/pressure features alone; second-route context is necessary
candidates.next_action: collect more exact cases and split by second-route context if feature bundle appears outside teacher/media alignment
